name: alex-harness
description: Personal SDLC harness — /helix is the only entrypoint, orchestrating a1-a8 + code-review + meta-audit phases under a Ralph passes contract. v0.8.1 adds anti-redundancy stack (Karpathy/Lean rules in CLAUDE.md + code-simplifier skill + monthly refactor-cycle), shared lib extraction (_meta/lib/common.cjs with nowBJ/safeAppend/stripBom/safeReadJsonl/printResult; ~120 lines deduped across 14 skills), and TTY-aware terminal output (-75~94% lines in human mode, 100% pipeline-safe). F-026 BOM defense baked into safeReadJsonl.
